design_philosophy: Modern Minimalism / Professional Dark Mode. Deep, matte black interfaces grounded with subtle, elegant Neon Purple glow effects. The neon acts as a kinetic trigger for conversion and active states, never overwhelming the content. High contrast, generous whitespace, and strictly rounded borders.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-white
rules.label: text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-widest text-zinc-500

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use large padding (p-12 to p-24) to create a premium, uncrowded feel.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-2xl for large cards, rounded-xl for standard components, rounded-full for buttons/badges
layout_and_spacing.landing_grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris) - Asymmetrical, gap-8 to gap-12
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid Mode B - Dense but readable, gap-6

button.primary: bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-500 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(168,85,247,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(168,85,247,0.6)]
button.secondary: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 hover:border-purple-500/50 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300

card.default: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-zinc-800/50 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-2xl p-8 transition-all hover:border-zinc-700
card.glow_border: relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:p-[1px] before:bg-gradient-to-b before:from-purple-500/30 before:to-transparent before:rounded-2xl before:-z-10

status_badges.subscribed: bg-purple-500/10 text-purple-400 border border-purple-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.pending: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium
status_badges.unsubscribed: bg-zinc-500/10 text-zinc-400 border border-zinc-500/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium

motion_and_interactions.carousel: Use Swiper.js or Framer Motion for premium slide transitions (fade + slight scale in). Include progress indicators.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle Y-axis translation (-translate-y-1) for cards. Glow intensification for primary buttons.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in and slight upward translation (opacity 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0) on mount.

images.description: Premium 3D generated neon purple gym environment. Ideal for the main landing page hero.
Dark aesthetic dumbbell. Use for Carousel slide 1.
Athletic person training dark moody. Use for Carousel slide 2.
Gym with exercise equipment at night. Use for Carousel slide 3.
Two people working out. Use for About Us section.

landing.hero: Full screen (min-h-[90vh]). Centered or left-aligned bold text. Carousel background with overlay (bg-black/60) to ensure text legibility. Prominent purple neon 'Registrarme' CTA.
landing.benefits: Bento Grid displaying high-contrast icons and short text. Subtle borders with hover glow effects.
landing.about: Asymmetrical layout. Large image alongside typography-heavy mission statement.
landing.auth_form: Minimalist card layout. Inputs with floating labels or very clean placeholders. Subdued borders that glow purple on focus (`focus:border-purple-500 focus:ring-purple-500/20`).

dashboard.layout: Sidebar navigation (darker than main bg) + Top header. Main content area with strict grid.
dashboard.kanban_table: List/Table view of users. Clean rows with hover states (`hover:bg-zinc-900/50`). Uses status pills.
dashboard.receipt_modal: Glassmorphism backdrop. Image scales cleanly within constraints (max-h-[70vh]). Actions: 'Aprobar' (Purple CTA) and 'Cerrar'.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all styling. Rely on arbitrary values for custom shadows or blur if necessary.
For the Landing Page Carousel, implement a premium slider (e.g., Swiper with fade effect or Framer Motion AnimatePresence).
Use Shadcn UI for forms, tables, and modals in the Dashboard. Customize Shadcn borders and radii to match these guidelines.
Ensure total compliance with accessibility contrast ratios, particularly against the dark backgrounds. Use text-white for key information and text-zinc-400 for secondary.
Inject the provided Unsplash/Generated images as backgrounds and content.
